TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Harung, title = Harung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harung} }

S.FORM: = Qhuni trabus/ Harung/ Qhuni trabus = Msama bay beyhing hnyuwan na ka harung nii, pusu balay qumi ka wasaw na, kingal bkuwan niqan rima qumi wasaw, kiya u kluwan psdhu Taywan hini, mniq mdakil ckck mi daya Taywan.↵ Ita Sediq ddiyun dha slmuun qhuni qtinuh, qnabin, uruc hakaw, qqiya sapah, rudu puting, mi slmuwan lblak, adaw ka niqan bay wluq, mniq cbiyaw cida, ita Sediq psqliyan dha smalu emu qhuni thuun puniq, prdax puniq, hruun dha qmpah kman. ↵ Cnduray nii daw, hbaraw bay ita Sediq ngalan dha ka wasaw na, sbtun na slmuwan wluq wasaw qumi harung, sun dha mahan qqiya miyah mimah, kiya uri u musa ta mksa dwiyaq muduh wawa ciida pmuman psaun wasaw harung nii, spuwan dha hmanguc; niqan uri mangal burah wasaw na sqmasan sinaw, mbahang kari u, ptduwa pkmalu mssiyaq; uxay uri u mbahang ita Sediq enchaya rmngaw, mniq sdalih pusu wamil na, mhru kluwan dhung, ngalan ta buhuway na bunga harung(tduwa uqun mi mnihur sknxan na) sbriyun sediq Tmukan, smluun dha iyu nglun na psbiyax hiyi.↵
S.PHON: = qħuni tɾabus/ ħaɾuŋ/ qħuni tɾabus = msama baj bəħiŋ ħnjuwan na ka ħaɾuŋ nii, pusu balaj qumi ka wasaw na, kiŋal bkuwan niqan ɾima qumi wasaw, kija u kluwan psdħu tajwan ħini, mniq mdakil ʦkʦk mi daja tajwan.* ita sədiq ddijun dħa slmuun qħuni qtinuħ, qnabin, uɾuʦ ħakaw, qqija sapaħ, ɾudu putiŋ, mi slmuwan lblak, adaw ka niqan baj wluq, mniq ʦbijaw ʦida, ita sədiq psqlijan dħa smalu əmu qħuni tħuun puniq, pɾdax puniq, ħɾuun dħa qmpaħ kman. * ʦnduɾaj nii daw, ħbaɾaw baj ita sədiq ŋalan dħa ka wasaw na, sbtun na slmuwan wluq wasaw qumi ħaɾuŋ, sun dħa maħan qqija mijaħ mimaħ, kija uɾi u musa ta mksa dwijaq muduħ wawa ʦiida pmuman psaun wasaw ħaɾuŋ nii, spuwan dħa ħmaŋuʦ; niqan uɾi maŋal buɾaħ wasaw na sqmasan sinaw, mbaħaŋ kaɾi u, ptduwa pkmalu mssijaq; uxaj uɾi u mbaħaŋ ita sədiq ənʦħaja ɾmŋaw, mniq sdaliħ pusu wamil na, mħɾu kluwan dħuŋ, ŋalan ta buħuwaj na buŋa ħaɾuŋ(tduwa uqun mi mniħuɾ sknxan na) sbɾijun sədiq tmukan, smluun dħa iju ŋlun na psbijax ħiji.*
S.FORM: = Qhuni trabus/ Harung/ Qhuni trabus = Msama bay beyhing hnyuwan na ka harung nii, pusu balay qumi ka wasaw na, kingal bkuwan niqan rima qumi wasaw, kiya u kluwan psdhu Taywan hini, mniq mdakil ckck mi daya Taywan.↵ Ita Sediq ddiyun dha slmuun qhuni qtinuh, qnabin, uruc hakaw, qqiya sapah, rudu puting, mi slmuwan lblak, adaw ka niqan bay wluq, mniq cbiyaw cida, ita Sediq psqliyan dha smalu emu qhuni thuun puniq, prdax puniq, hruun dha qmpah kman. ↵ Cnduray nii daw, hbaraw bay ita Sediq ngalan dha ka wasaw na, sbtun na slmuwan wluq wasaw qumi harung, sun dha mahan qqiya miyah mimah, kiya uri u musa ta mksa dwiyaq muduh wawa ciida pmuman psaun wasaw harung nii, spuwan dha hmanguc; niqan uri mangal burah wasaw na sqmasan sinaw, mbahang kari u, ptduwa pkmalu mssiyaq; uxay uri u mbahang ita Sediq enchaya rmngaw, mniq sdalih pusu wamil na, mhru kluwan dhung, ngalan ta buhuway na bunga harung(tduwa uqun mi mnihur sknxan na) sbriyun sediq Tmukan, smluun dha iyu nglun na psbiyax hiyi.↵
S.PHON: = qħuni tɾabus/ ħaɾuŋ/ qħuni tɾabus = msama baj bəħiŋ ħnjuwan na ka ħaɾuŋ nii, pusu balaj qumi ka wasaw na, kiŋal bkuwan niqan ɾima qumi wasaw, kija u kluwan psdħu tajwan ħini, mniq mdakil ʦkʦk mi daja tajwan.* ita sədiq ddijun dħa slmuun qħuni qtinuħ, qnabin, uɾuʦ ħakaw, qqija sapaħ, ɾudu putiŋ, mi slmuwan lblak, adaw ka niqan baj wluq, mniq ʦbijaw ʦida, ita sədiq psqlijan dħa smalu əmu qħuni tħuun puniq, pɾdax puniq, ħɾuun dħa qmpaħ kman. * ʦnduɾaj nii daw, ħbaɾaw baj ita sədiq ŋalan dħa ka wasaw na, sbtun na slmuwan wluq wasaw qumi ħaɾuŋ, sun dħa maħan qqija mijaħ mimaħ, kija uɾi u musa ta mksa dwijaq muduħ wawa ʦiida pmuman psaun wasaw ħaɾuŋ nii, spuwan dħa ħmaŋuʦ; niqan uɾi maŋal buɾaħ wasaw na sqmasan sinaw, mbaħaŋ kaɾi u, ptduwa pkmalu mssijaq; uxaj uɾi u mbaħaŋ ita sədiq ənʦħaja ɾmŋaw, mniq sdaliħ pusu wamil na, mħɾu kluwan dħuŋ, ŋalan ta buħuwaj na buŋa ħaɾuŋ(tduwa uqun mi mniħuɾ sknxan na) sbɾijun sədiq tmukan, smluun dħa iju ŋlun na psbijax ħiji.*
